research_interests: Contemporary Taiwan literature; cinema; and cultural politics. Postcolonial ecocriticism and eco-literature in Taiwan and the Pacific. Indigenous literature; knowledge; and activism. Migration; displacement; and identity politics in the Asia Pacific. Environmental humanities; climate change; and sustainability; key publications: Isle of the Austronesian: Indigeneity; World-Making and Taiwan (Balestier Press; 2025); Reorientating Taiwan: Ocean; Selfhood and the Pacific (Brill; A Transdisciplinary Study of Global Mobilities: Identities on the Move (Springer; 2024)
